chain.thought: The question is asking to find out how many injuries were reported in the year when toy safety funding was at its lowest. This will help us identify the year with the lowest funding, and then we can look at the corresponding "injuries" value for that year.
The toy safety funding was reported at its lowest in 2004 with a value of 11.5 US$ millions. In the same year, the number of injuries reported was 210 (US$000). Therefore, the answer is 210.
